ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct. */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the precinct. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the precinct. */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the precinct. */,
  "voting_machines" INTEGER /* Number of voting machines available in the precinct. */,
  "poll_workers" INTEGER /* Number of poll workers assigned to the precinct. */,
  "election_day_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the polls open. */,
  "election_day_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the polls close. */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude for precise location mapping. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registered_voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter. */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voter is registered. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter. */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered. */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter. */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the voter. */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the voter. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active, Inactive, or Suspended status of the voter. */,
  "registration_method" TEXT /* How the voter registered (e.g., online, in-person). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registered_voters_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot. */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the ballot was cast. */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter who cast the ballot. */,
  "cast_date" TEXT /* Date when the ballot was cast. */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., absentee, mail, in-person). */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., cast, rejected, pending). */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the ballot is rejected. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES registered_voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate. */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate. */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate. */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general). */,
  "office" TEXT /* The office the candidate is running for. */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the candidate is an incumbent. */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website. */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information (email and phone number) for the candidate. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record. */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes are counted. */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who received the votes. */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate. */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election in which the votes were counted. */,
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ballot that cast the vote. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_ballot_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_id") REFERENCES ballots ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election. */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election. */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., Primary, General). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election. */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election. */,
  "election_level" TEXT /* Level of the election (e.g., municipal, state, national). */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., scheduled, ongoing, completed). */,
  "results_finalized" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the results are finalized. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record. */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which turnout is being tracked. */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where turnout is recorded. */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct. */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast. */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted. */,
  "early_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of early votes. */,
  "absentee_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes. */,
  "in_person_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes. */,
  "total_voting_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account. */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election officer, analyst). */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login. */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action. */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred. */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed. */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used. */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, logout, view results). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record. */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter. */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter. */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter. */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter. */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed. */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the voter. */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the voter. */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the voter. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES registered_voters ("voter_id")
)
